title: taraxacum euranum
intro: Taraxacum euranum, also known as the European dandelion, is a plant species belonging to the sunflower family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues due to its high content of inulin, a prebiotic fiber that promotes gut health. The plant's roots, leaves, and flowers have been used to make herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which offer various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving liver function, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum euranum can be consumed as a dietary supplement or used topically to soothe skin irritations and wounds.
